languages.text: "Для гильз можно использовать что-то легко сгорающее, но плотное. Я, кажется, видел{mf||а} у вас что-то вроде грубой бумаги".
"For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."
languages.original_text: "Для гильз можно использовать что-то легко сгорающее, но плотное. Я, кажется, видел{mf||а} у вас что-то вроде грубой бумаги".

traits.locale_text: "For the casings, we can use something that burns easily but can hold its shape. I think I saw you carrying some kind of coarse paper."
"For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."
"For the casings, try to find something that burns easily but can hold its shape."
"For the casings, we can use something that burns easily but can hold its shape. I think I saw you carrying some kind of coarse paper."
"For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."
"For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."

languages.text: 「外皮には、燃えやすいけど形を保てるものを探してみて。」
languages.original_text: "For the casings, try to find something that burns easily but can hold its shape."

languages.text: "Kovanlar için kolay yanan ama şeklini koruyan bir şey kullanılabilir. Buralarda bir tür kaba kâğıt görmüştüm."
languages.original_text: "For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."

traits.locale_text: "Kovanlar için kolay yanan ama şeklini koruyan bir şey kullanılabilir. Buralarda bir tür kaba kâğıt görmüştüm."

languages.text: “至于弹壳，可以试试那种容易燃烧，但又能保持形状的东西。我记得这附近好像有种粗糙的纸。”
languages.original_text: "For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."

traits.locale_text: “至于弹壳，可以试试那种容易燃烧，但又能保持形状的东西。我记得这附近好像有种粗糙的纸。”

languages.text: "Ihr könntet für die Hülsen etwas verwenden, das leicht brennt, aber seine Form behält. Ich denke, ich habe hier irgendwo grobes Papier gesehen."
languages.original_text: "For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr könntet für die Hülsen etwas verwenden, das leicht brennt, aber seine Form behält. Ich denke, ich habe hier irgendwo grobes Papier gesehen."

languages.text: « Pour les douilles, vous devriez utiliser un matériau inflammable capable de conserver sa forme même sous l'effet d'une forte chaleur. Il me semble avoir vu une sorte de papier épais dans les parages. »
languages.original_text: "For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."

traits.locale_text: « Pour les douilles, vous devriez utiliser un matériau inflammable capable de conserver sa forme même sous l'effet d'une forte chaleur. Il me semble avoir vu une sorte de papier épais dans les parages. »

languages.text: «Para los casquillos, podrían usar algo que arda con facilidad pero que conserve su forma. Creo que he visto una especie de papel grueso por aquí».
languages.original_text: "For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."

traits.locale_text: «Para los casquillos, podrían usar algo que arda con facilidad pero que conserve su forma. Creo que he visto una especie de papel grueso por aquí».
